name: ado-cost-rollup-widget
description: Azure DevOps dashboard widget that aggregates work items by any field and sums a numeric field as currency.
author: Deenu Gengiti

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && npm run webpack
scripts.package: npm run build && tfx extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.json
scripts.publish:marketplace: npm run build && tfx extension publish --manifest-globs vss-extension.json
